name: Alice Smith
bio: Alice has 15 years of experience leading tech startups to acquisition. She is passionate about leveraging AI to solve complex business problems.

name: Bob Jones
bio: A pioneer in cloud architecture, Bob previously led infrastructure teams at major tech giants before co-founding MYL-Tech.

name: Charlie Davis
bio: Charlie brings a user-first approach to all projects, ensuring that every interface is both beautiful and highly functional.
